name: Ying Gou
bio:
Blood-Bathed Warrior from the Scarlet Feather Clan. Though unable to fly, his hard and sharp feathers are terrifying lethal weapons.

Role: Physical Damage Dealer
Specialty: A front-midline Breakthrough-type hero with high burst damage; skills have Corrosion effects and can enhance allies' damage against Corroded enemies.

skillSlots.name: Fantasy Sword Arise
skillSlots.description: Deals 110% M.DMG to mid/backline enemies and randomly distributes 4 stacks of [Infect] among hit enemies (60% application chance).

skillSlots.name: Azure Dragonshadow
skillSlots.description: Attacks 4 random enemy targets, dealing 200% P.DMG with 80% chance to apply 1 stack of [Infect].

effects.name: Amulet Release
effects.description: Gains [Unseal] after releasing [Fantasy Sword Arise], then increases ATK by 10% for 1 turn.

effects.name: Amulet Release
effects.description: Applies [Unseal] to highest-ATK Ally when releasing [Fantasy Sword Arise] (effect halved unless ally shares Ying Gou's faction).

effects.name: Amulet Release
effects.description: [Daylight Dragonshadow]'s attack range expanded to all enemies.
